name: field-add-simple
request: Add a Picklist field Account_Tier__c on Lead with values Bronze, Silver, Gold. Default to Bronze. This is for the Krahnborn org.

name: access-grant-via-permset
request: Give Tonya read+edit access to the Industry field on Account in the Krahnborn org. She's a sales user.

name: profile-edit-attempt
request: Update the Standard profile in our Krahnborn org to give edit access on Lead.Status.

name: ambiguous-tier
request: Add a field to track customer tier on accounts.

name: multi-object-checkbox
request: Add a checkbox field Has_VIP_Customer__c on both Account and Contact in Krahnborn. Sales reps need to check it manually.

name: validation-rule
request: Add a validation rule on Opportunity in Krahnborn that requires CloseDate to be at least 30 days in the future when Stage moves past Qualification.

name: doc-only
request: Document the steps for onboarding a new sales rep in our Krahnborn org.

name: create-new-permset-needed
request: Set up a separate access tier for our new Customer Success role in Krahnborn — they should see all Cases and Contacts but not Opportunities. We don't have a permset for them yet.
